_phase_description: Phase 2a: contract blocks are optional. Verification runs only when a contract block is present in the dispatch. No dispatches are required to carry contracts.

2a.description: Optional contracts. Verification conditional on contract presence.
2a.scope: all dispatches may include contracts; none are required

2b.description: Contracts required for high-risk and implementation dispatches.

2c.description: Contracts are the default for all relevant PRs. Explicit opt-out reason required.
